title: Pikachu and Friends
description: Cosplay Pikachus and shiny chases up front, then a grassy picnic with the Kanto starters. A little showcase of what a michi binder can be.

pages.title: Pikachu Shrine
pages.description: Pikachus I will never be able to afford lol.

pages.title: Togepi and Friends
pages.description: Togepi and friends enjoying a beautiful picnic eating strawberries.

pages.title: Watery Bridge
pages.description: Art of artofpkm, these cards fit seamlessly into the pond environment.

pages.title: Animal Reverse Holos
pages.description: Cheap holos of one type, all in one page.  Bulk cards look very organized and clean this way.

pages.title: Charizard Energy
pages.description: Charizard swith some fire fire energy he's making.

pages.title: Hands!
pages.description: Inspired by a reddit post I saw, this page is dedicated to the pose of hands reaching out!

pages.title: Forest Friends Napping
pages.description: Three forest friends, surrounded by beautiful card sleeve art renditions of them napping.

title: Ideas in Flight
description: A couple full art story page ideas thrown in throughout the binder (sky reshiram and friends page, misty page, houndoom page, ...)

pages.title: Page 1
pages.description: Sky reshiram and friends, layout #1

pages.title: Page 3
pages.description: Sky reshiram and friends, layout #2

pages.title: Golden Future
pages.description: Futuristic shiny gold items and the shiny gold cities that they would come from.

pages.title: Black and Blue
pages.description: Beautiful black and blue themed full arts

pages.title: Apples Sensei
pages.description: Throh, surrounded by apples and cherries, he looks like the black-belt master of round red fruity things.

pages.title: Boss's Orders
pages.description: Tribute to the Boss's Orders card.  Looks like Giovanni is calling the shots.

pages.title: Houndoom's Dream
pages.description: Houndoom howling up into the sky, creating a universe with sparking crobats, tyranitars, and dark energy.

pages.title: Orca Shrine
pages.description:
Illustrator Highlight - Orca
Centered is his first piece, charmander, with Full Arts in the corners

pages.title: Misty's Pokemon
pages.description: Misty hanging out with some of her favorite water pokemon.

title: ME: Pitch Black Chase
description: All Pitch Black Illustration Rares and Special Illustration Rares, highlighted with other similar cards and custom art.

pages.title: The Chase
pages.description: Some of the chase cards in this set for me, along with artist renderings of their SIRs up top.

pages.title: Mega Morpoko
pages.description: The two full art (Special) Illustration Rares in ME: Pitch Black, unleashing some energy.

pages.title: Boom
pages.description: Mega Exadrill and crushing hammer smash into the fire crystal to blow up the ground and reveal Rampardos.

pages.title: Lurantis
pages.description: Lurantis Secret Illustration Rare featured center, surrounded by other set's variations of her.

pages.title: Syndicate Tooling
pages.description: Gladion and Syndicate grunts featured with their new full-art items.  other printings of the items featured below.

pages.title: Boom, a Love Story
pages.description: Gwynn seen triggering a Tremendous (LOVE) Bomb, which catches Gladion and Misty in the blast.
